io.github.project516.NumberGuessingGame

Class HighScoreManager

  • java.lang.Object
    • io.github.project516.NumberGuessingGame.HighScoreManager

  • public class HighScoreManager
extends java.lang.Object
    Manages high scores for the Number Guessing Game. Handles loading, saving, and retrieving high scores from persistent storage.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      HighScoreManager()
      Constructs a new HighScoreManager and loads existing high scores from storage.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      boolean addHighScore(java.lang.String username, int numberOfGuesses)
      Adds a new high score.
      java.util.List<HighScore> getAllHighScores()
      Gets all high scores.
      java.util.List<HighScore> getTopHighScores(int limit)
      Gets the top high scores.
      boolean isHighScore(int numberOfGuesses)
      Checks if a given number of guesses qualifies as a high score.

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Constructor Detail

      • HighScoreManager

        public HighScoreManager()
                 throws java.io.IOException
        Constructs a new HighScoreManager and loads existing high scores from storage.
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - if there is an error creating the storage directory

    • Method Detail

      • addHighScore

        public boolean addHighScore(java.lang.String username,
                            int numberOfGuesses)
        Adds a new high score. The score will only be saved if it is in the top scores. The list is automatically sorted and trimmed to the maximum number of high scores.
        Parameters:
        username - the username of the player
        numberOfGuesses - the number of guesses it took to win
        Returns:
        true if the score was added to the high scores list, false otherwise

      • getTopHighScores

        public java.util.List<HighScore> getTopHighScores(int limit)
        Gets the top high scores.
        Parameters:
        limit - the maximum number of high scores to return
        Returns:
        a list of the top high scores, limited by the specified amount

      • getAllHighScores

        public java.util.List<HighScore> getAllHighScores()
        Gets all high scores.
        Returns:
        a list of all high scores

      • isHighScore

        public boolean isHighScore(int numberOfGuesses)
        Checks if a given number of guesses qualifies as a high score.
        Parameters:
        numberOfGuesses - the number of guesses to check
        Returns:
        true if this would be a high score, false otherwise
